_comment: Copy next to the binary as 'yirang_onnx_configurations.json'. Static engine settings only (logging/title/ONNX Runtime session tuning); job-level values live in input_project.json (--input-script) or CLI args. write_console/write_file are LogTypes ints (0=None).
_session_comment: ONNX Runtime session tuning. Omit any key to keep ORT defaults. intra/inter_op_threads: 0 lets ORT decide. execution_mode: sequential|parallel. graph_optimization: disabled|basic|extended|all.
